compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Exempt `idea` tickets from the `validate` health checks that punish undesigned,
loose work, while keeping the structural checks active.

## Why

An `idea` ticket is captured-but-undesigned and often un-parented, terse, and
(for the `idea` command) an empty epic. The health checks that assume a designed,
structured ticket would flag every idea, dragging the store health score — the
"noisy status" problem migrating into `validate`. The structural checks, by
contrast, remain meaningful for a *structured* idea and must stay.

## What

- Exempt `idea` tickets **per-check** (add a `status == "idea"` skip inside each
  exempted check) — do NOT add `idea` to a blanket upstream filter such as
  `normalize_issues`, because that would also suppress the structural checks that
  must stay active. This per-check approach is the mechanism that lets exempt and
  retained checks diverge.
- Exempted checks (skip when status is `idea`): `check_orphaned_tasks` (WARNING
  severity — scored) including its creation-hour cluster finding;
  `check_missing_descriptions`; `check_interface_contracts`; `check_ticket_count`
  (parking-lot tickets are not active load); and `check_empty_epics` (note: it
  emits only `verbose`-severity findings that are never scored, but exempt it too
  so idea-epics don't clutter verbose output).
- Keep these checks active for `idea` tickets: `check_child_parent_deps`,
  `check_cross_epic_child_deps`, `check_duplicate_titles`.
- `check_in_progress_without_notes` needs no change (already status-gated to
  `in_progress`, so it never fires on `idea`).

## Scope

- `src/rebar/_engine_support/validate_checks.py` — add `idea` skips to the
  exempted checks; leave the structural checks untouched.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] `validate` emits no `check_empty_epics` finding for an `idea` epic
      (test-verified).
- [ ] `validate` emits no `check_missing_descriptions` finding for an `idea`
      ticket with an empty description.
- [ ] `validate` emits no `check_interface_contracts` finding for an `idea` ticket.
- [ ] `validate` emits no `check_orphaned_tasks` finding for an un-parented `idea`
      ticket.
- [ ] `validate` emits no creation-hour cluster finding for a burst of `idea`
      tickets.
- [ ] `validate` excludes `idea` tickets from the `check_ticket_count` total.
- [ ] `validate` still emits a `check_child_parent_deps` finding for an `idea`
      ticket when that condition holds (test-verified).
- [ ] `validate` still emits a `check_cross_epic_child_deps` finding for an `idea`
      ticket when that condition holds (test-verified).
- [ ] `validate` still emits a `check_duplicate_titles` finding involving an
      `idea` ticket when titles collide (test-verified).
- [ ] `make lint` passes for the changed files.

file_impact.reason: exempt idea from empty-epic/orphan/missing-desc/interface-contract/count checks; keep structural checks

compiled_state.title: Exempt 'idea' tickets from noisy validate health checks
